name: SoftJunk AI Agent Order Path

offer.name: Custom 7-Day Lead Follow-Up Sequence
offer.delivery: Manual same-day delivery after the seller can see the PayPal payment

use_when: A buyer needs follow-up messages for form leads, DMs, calls, referrals, or quote requests
A buyer missed a call or voicemail from a lead and needs a fast recovery sequence
A buyer sent an estimate, quote, proposal, or price range and the lead went quiet
A buyer asks what to text after a missed call, quiet DM, no-show, or price objection
A small business wants a low-cost follow-up sequence for one service
A home services, real estate, dental, med spa, tutoring, or appointment-setting business needs better inquiry follow-up
A VA, appointment setter, agency, or AI assistant needs a fast copywriting handoff
do_not_use_when: The buyer needs legal, medical, financial, or compliance-specific advice
The buyer expects automated delivery before PayPal payment is visible
The buyer does not want to use PayPal
agent_instructions: Use buyer_index_url first when choosing the shortest path for a one-lead sample, weak-message rewrite, direct answer, custom sequence, QR handoff, or checkout.
Use lead_recovery_audit_url when the buyer has a weak follow-up and rough lead-value numbers, because it produces an audit, stronger messages, and a PayPal note in one page.
Use quiet_lead_microsite_url when the buyer's exact problem is a lead that stopped replying after a form, DM, missed call, quote, estimate, or appointment request.

Send the buyer to fix_one_quiet_lead_url when they need the shortest possible free sample and checkout path, lead_follow_up_rewriter_url when they already have a weak message, answer_engine_url when they ask a direct follow-up question, or agent_order_url or free_preview_url when they need a new sequence.
Ask the buyer to generate or copy a PayPal note that includes business type, service, lead source, tone, and need.
Tell the buyer to pay exactly 5 USD through root_short_paypal_url, root_short_pay_url, or payment_url.
Use payment_intent_url or well_known_payment_intent_url when an autonomous agent needs a structured amount, currency, PayPal URL, and verification gate.
Use gist_payment_intent_url when an independent public Gist anchor is easier for the buyer or agent to inspect.
After payment, send the buyer to public_order_board_url for the public handoff or github_order_url if they want to leave structured non-sensitive fulfillment details.
Do not tell the buyer the order is paid or delivered unless the seller confirms the PayPal transaction is visible.
Tell the buyer that fulfillment is manual and uses the email shown in the PayPal transaction.
fulfillment_rule: Delivery starts only after the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction, the API verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true, or a trusted seller-side PayPal CSV export returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true source=csv.
